data.name: Springs of Ardor
data.detailed_description:
Springs of Ardor is a explicit visual novel/lite adventure game made in Full HD, with the following themes; Gay, Romance, Humor, Polyamory, Group Sex, Muscle Worship, Mystery and Magic.


  • Over 6 hours of play.
  • Contains over 800 renders.
  • 18 Different sex scenes.
  • More than 200 gallery unlockables.
  • Over 18 Steam achievements
  • Embark on a thrilling journey through a nudist resort on a tropical paradise island, where nudity reigns supreme! Get ready for an indulgent escape filled with gratuitous nudity at every turn!


Embark on an electrifying adventure with Noah, a perpetually lustful young gay man, as he unexpectedly inherits the illustrious Ardor Springs from his estranged uncle Harold. Dive headfirst into the riveting revelation of Ardor Springs, a men-only nudist haven nestled on the sun-kissed shores of Coralina Island, and discover the awe-inspiring power it bestows upon its new heir. Brace yourself for a whirlwind of responsibility and revelation as Noah navigates this uncharted territory.

Fear not, for Noah is not alone in his journey! Within the vibrant enclave of Ardor Springs, a cadre of eager men stands ready to offer their unwavering support, and perhaps a bit more! From the ruggedly handsome Juan, affectionately known as “Big Guy,” to the irresistibly suave Mateo, fondly dubbed “My Popstar” for his modern allure, Noah finds himself surrounded by allies who are eager to lend a helping hand, and maybe even steal his heart along the way. Join Noah on this sensational voyage where every twist and turn promises excitement, intrigue, and a dash of steamy romance!

data.short_description: Springs of Ardor is a visual novel game that takes players on a thrilling journey through a nudist resort on a tropical paradise island, where nudity reigns supreme! Get ready for an indulgent escape filled with gratuitous nudity at every turn!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or Better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or Better
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需使用 Apple 處理器
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 High Sierra or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 (or newer)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU supporting OpenGL 2.1+
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Runs on Apple Silicon (M1/M2) using native Ren’Py support.
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需使用 Apple 處理器

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 (64-bit) or equivalent
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD dual-core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.1+ compatible GPU with updated drivers
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Tested on Steam Deck (Linux). May require installing system-wide codecs on some distributions.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or Better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 or Better
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires an Apple processor
  • OS: macOS 10.13 High Sierra or later
  • Processor: Apple M1 (or newer)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any GPU supporting OpenGL 2.1+
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Runs on Apple Silicon (M1/M2) using native Ren’Py support.

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 18.04 (64-bit) or equivalent
  • Processor: Intel or AMD dual-core CPU
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.1+ compatible GPU with updated drivers
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Tested on Steam Deck (Linux). May require installing system-wide codecs on some distributions.
